mechanism: Inhibits FLT3 and other kinases (RAF/VEGFR) to block proliferation signaling

mechanism: Inhibits FLT3 and receptor tyrosine kinases (VEGFR/PDGFR)

mechanism: Inhibits FLT3 (including TKD mutants) and BCR-ABL

mechanism: Inhibits FLT3, MET, and AXL signaling pathways
additional_notes: Approved for RCC/HCC; expected ~10–100 nM in AML cells

mechanism: Inhibits FLT3, RAF, and VEGFR family kinases
additional_notes: Approved for CRC/GIST/HCC; expected ~0.1–1 µM in cells

mechanism: Inhibits VEGFR/FGFR and has reported FLT3 activity
additional_notes: Approved for DTC/HCC/EC; expected ~0.05–0.5 µM

mechanism: VEGFR inhibitor with reported FLT3 activity
additional_notes: Approved for RCC; expected ~0.3–3 µM in AML cells

mechanism: Inhibits EGFR/VEGFR/RET with reported FLT3 coverage
additional_notes: Approved for MTC; expected ~0.3–3 µM in AML cells

mechanism: SRC/SYK family kinase inhibitor that disrupts AML signaling
additional_notes: Approved for CML/ALL; expected ~10–100 nM

mechanism: Selective JAK1/2 inhibition reduces cytokine-driven survival signaling
additional_notes: Approved for MF/PV; context-dependent potency (~1–10 µM)

mechanism: Reversible 26S proteasome inhibition induces apoptosis

mechanism: Inhibits mitochondrial translation in leukemia cells
additional_notes: Prepare fresh; light-sensitive; expected ~1–10 µM

mechanism: Thioredoxin reductase inhibition leading to redox stress
additional_notes: Approved for RA; expected ~0.2–2 µM

mechanism: Microtubule polymerization inhibitor; disrupts mitosis
additional_notes: Watch solubility; expected ~0.1–1 µM

mechanism: Mitochondrial uncoupler; inhibits Wnt/STAT3/oxidative phosphorylation

mechanism: Dopamine D2 receptor antagonist; reported leukemia stem cell targeting
